---
title: "Mary Parker, Ctss of Macclesfield"
---

## Mary Parker, Ctss of Macclesfield

**Dates:** 1822-1912

**Maiden name:** (Grosvenor)

### Description

philanthropist

### Biography

She married (1842) the 6th Earl of Macclesfield (1811-1896) and had 15 children.  Her husband was succeeded by a grandson who did not marry till 1909, so she must be the person referred to.

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 25 [1899]](../letters/3420_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
